site.name: Dev Nandini Hospital & Medical College
site.tagline: A medical institution in Hapur. Tertiary care and teaching for North India.

home.heroBody: Dev Nandini Hospital is a tertiary care center and medical college serving Western Uttar Pradesh. Round-the-clock emergency, critical care, and over thirty specialties. Under one roof.
home.departmentsHeadline: More than thirty specialties. One institution.
home.doctorsHeadline: Meet the hands that will look after you.
home.academicsHeadline: Training the next generation of physicians.
home.emergencyBody: Our emergency service is available 365 days, 24 hours. An ambulance is one call away.

footer.address: Near Railway Crossing, Garh Road, Hapur, Uttar Pradesh
footer.patientsDesc: Outpatient bookings, in-patient admissions, lab reports, and visitor information.
footer.academicsDesc: MBBS and post-graduate training, admissions guidance, faculty, and research.
footer.newsDesc: Recent news, announcements, and free health camps run by the hospital.
footer.institutionDesc: The hospital story, leadership, accreditations, and how we are built.
